title: FunctionalPrint
description: A comprehensive web platform that allows users to easily book and customize document printing services, while providing administrators with a robust dashboard to manage print orders.
content:
### FunctionalPrint

Built to streamline the document printing process, FunctionalPrint offers a seamless user experience for uploading, editing, and ordering document prints (both color and B&W), paired with a secure administrative backend for order fulfillment.

#### Key Features
- **Document Processing:** Seamless PDF and image upload with real-time preview and multi-page support.
- **A4 Editing Studio:** In-browser image cropping and editing tailored specifically for A4 print dimensions.
- **Order Management:** A comprehensive administrative dashboard to track, update, and manage all incoming print bookings.

#### Technical Deep Dive
The frontend is powered by **React** and **Vite** for a fast, responsive user interface, utilizing **Tailwind CSS** for styling and **Framer Motion** for smooth transitions. Document handling is achieved via **PDF.js** and **react-easy-crop** for precise formatting. The backend relies on **Firebase Realtime Database** for live order tracking and **Firebase Storage** for secure document and image hosting.

title: FunctionalAgro
description: An advanced, AI-driven agricultural assistant that empowers Indian farmers with instant on-device crop diagnosis, multilingual advisory, and real-time market price negotiation.
content:
### FunctionalAgro

Designed to overcome rural connectivity challenges, FunctionalAgro leverages Edge AI and Generative LLMs to deliver hyper-localized, weather-aware agricultural insights and fair-trade negotiation directly to farmers in multiple Indian languages.

#### Key Features
- **Edge AI Diagnosis:** Instantaneous, offline-capable crop disease identification running locally in the browser using TensorFlow.js.
- **Multilingual AI Advisory:** Voice-to-voice interaction in 7+ languages, powered by Gemini 1.5 Flash and weather APIs for localized farming advice.
- **AI Dalal Negotiation:** Real-time crop price negotiation with AI trader personas, backed by live Government of India Agmarknet data.

#### Technical Deep Dive
The platform uses **React** and **Vite** as a Progressive Web App (PWA) for offline resilience, integrating **TensorFlow.js** (`MobileNet V2`) for on-device edge inference. The backend is built with **FastAPI** to ensure high-performance asynchronous handling of heavy API calls, utilizing the **Gemini API** for generative responses and **SQLite** for real-time disease outbreak geotagging. **Firebase** handles secure Google authentication and user alert preferences.

title: FunctionalCloud (FunctionalBloom)
description: A full-stack e-commerce storefront featuring a live product catalogue, integrated shopping cart, secure checkout flow, and an administrative management panel.
content:
### FunctionalCloud

FunctionalCloud (also known as FunctionalBloom) provides a complete, scalable e-commerce solution with a polished shopping experience for customers and robust inventory management tools for store owners.

#### Key Features
- **Live Storefront:** Dynamic product catalogue with detailed individual product views and smooth navigation.
- **Checkout Flow:** Integrated cart review and order placement system with order confirmation pages.
- **Admin Panel:** Restricted, secure dashboard for managing orders, products, and store operations.

#### Technical Deep Dive
The application is built on **React 19** and **TypeScript** using **Vite** for rapid development and optimized production builds. The UI is styled with **Tailwind CSS v4** and animated using **Framer Motion** for a premium feel. The entire backend infrastructure relies on **Firebase Firestore** for scalable NoSQL data storage and **Firebase Auth** for secure Google OAuth sign-ins and role-based access control.

title: FunctionalFits (SWEAT)
description: A high-energy, neo-brutalist fitness landing page and booking application designed to streamline gym session scheduling with a striking, modern aesthetic.
content:
### FunctionalFits

FunctionalFits (SWEAT) captures the intensity of modern fitness culture through a bold neo-brutalist design while providing a seamless, integrated booking system for gym members to schedule their sessions.

#### Key Features
- **Striking Design:** A neo-brutalist aesthetic featuring harsh borders, high-contrast colors, and dynamic micro-animations.
- **Integrated Booking:** A lightweight, easy-to-use session booking form that captures user scheduling data instantly.
- **Concurrent Execution:** Seamlessly runs both the frontend interface and backend API simultaneously for a streamlined developer experience.

#### Technical Deep Dive
The frontend leverages **React** and **Vite** styled heavily with **Tailwind CSS v4** and **Motion** to achieve its aggressive neo-brutalist visual language. The backend utilizes a lightweight **Express.js** API that handles booking submissions and reads/writes to a local JSON database, making it highly portable and easy to deploy as a unified service.

title: FunctionalTrazz
description: A comprehensive and secure travel portal featuring interactive destination booking, robust itinerary workflows, and a unified dashboard for tracking trip finances.
content:
### FunctionalTrazz

FunctionalTrazz (formerly FunctionalTraval) bridges the gap between travel inspiration and execution, offering users a seamless booking platform backed by an isolated administrative dashboard for secure workflow management.

#### Key Features
- **Interactive Booking:** A seamless, visually rich user experience for searching, filtering, and booking global travel destinations.
- **Financial Tracking:** A unified budget management page allowing users to track their trip expenses and overall finances.
- **Secure Admin Portal:** A completely isolated administrative dashboard for full control over user trips, bookings, and platform data.

#### Technical Deep Dive
The frontend is built with **React 19** and **React Router v7** for robust client-side routing, utilizing **Tailwind CSS v4** and **Framer Motion** for a dynamic UI. The backend is powered by **Node.js** and **Express**, integrating the **Firebase Admin SDK** to securely interface with **Firestore** for data storage and **Firebase Authentication** for user profiles. It also features a mock-data fallback system ensuring the app remains fully demo-ready offline.

title: AI Accessibility Hub (FunctionalHealth)
description: A monorepo of three AI-powered web applications that make healthcare and public services more accessible and equitable for everyone — unified under a single authenticated dashboard.
content:
### AI Accessibility Hub

Built for Hackwarz 2K26 under Theme 5 (AI for Accessibility, Healthcare & Well-Being), this hub unifies three AI-powered services under a single Firebase-authenticated dashboard.

#### Key Features
- **FunctionalAccess:** Real-time sign language and speech-to-text translation for accessible communication.
- **Aurora:** AI chatbot and voice analysis tool for mental health support and stress detection.
- **FunctionalDetect:** Image-based early disease detection from phone photos, powered by generative AI.

#### Technical Deep Dive
The accessibility module (**FunctionalAccess**) is built on **React** and **FastAPI**, using **MediaPipe** for real-time hand-tracking and gesture recognition. **Aurora** runs on **Vite** and integrates the **Gemini API** for conversational voice analysis. **FunctionalDetect** also leverages the **Gemini API** for image-based diagnostic inference, with a shared **React** frontend tying all three services into one authenticated dashboard.

title: FunctionalCosmos
description: A fully immersive, 3D interactive portfolio and data visualization experience showcasing projects and professional skills through a cosmic, planetary interface.
content:
### FunctionalCosmos

FunctionalCosmos reimagines the traditional digital portfolio by transforming professional experience and project data into an explorable 3D solar system, offering an engaging and memorable user journey.

#### Key Features
- **3D Planetary Interface:** Interactive celestial bodies representing different projects and skills, rendered beautifully in the browser.
- **Cinematic Effects:** Advanced post-processing including bloom and custom shaders for a hyper-realistic space aesthetic.
- **Data Delivery:** A lightweight backend API that reliably serves portfolio metadata to the immersive frontend environment.

#### Technical Deep Dive
The frontend is an engineering feat built with **Next.js 16**, relying on **Three.js** via `@react-three/fiber` and `@react-three/drei` for 3D web rendering, alongside **GSAP** for complex animation sequencing. The data layer is decoupled into a **FastAPI (Python)** backend utilizing **SQLAlchemy** and **SQLite/PostgreSQL** to serve project metadata via high-speed, validated JSON endpoints.

title: FunctionalFinance
description: An end-to-end tax deduction finder and financial calculator designed specifically to help Indian taxpayers optimize their income tax returns.
content:
### FunctionalFinance

FunctionalFinance simplifies complex Indian tax regulations by providing a user-friendly calculator that compares the old and new tax regimes, highlighting potential savings and deduction opportunities.

#### Key Features
- **Regime Comparison:** Instantly calculates and compares tax liabilities between the Old and New Indian tax regimes.
- **Deduction Optimization:** Factors in HRA, Section 80C, 80D, and home loan interests to maximize user tax savings.
- **Detailed Breakdowns:** Provides transparent, slab-by-slab tax calculations and standard deduction visualizations.

#### Technical Deep Dive
The application is structured as a modern full-stack monorepo, utilizing **Next.js** and **TypeScript** for a strongly-typed frontend interface. The backend logic is driven by a **Node.js/Express** API that leverages **Zod** for strict input validation of complex financial data. Database operations are handled via **Prisma ORM**, ensuring type-safe and reliable storage of user profiles and historical calculations.

title: FunctionalBits (Green Scheduler)
description: A carbon-aware scheduler for batch computing jobs that dynamically routes heavy workloads based on the real-time carbon intensity of the power grid.
content:
### FunctionalBits

FunctionalBits (Green Scheduler) tackles the environmental impact of cloud computing by delaying or geographically relocating computational jobs to regions where the energy grid is currently operating on low-carbon or renewable sources.

#### Key Features
- **Carbon-Aware Routing:** Intelligently delays or routes jobs to regions with lower carbon intensity (e.g., < 150 gCO2/kWh).
- **Real-time API Integration:** Interfaces with carbon intensity data providers (like Electricity Maps) to make live scheduling decisions.
- **Impact Tracking:** Calculates and visualizes the total carbon emissions saved by the intelligent scheduling algorithm.

#### Technical Deep Dive
The core scheduling engine runs on **FastAPI** utilizing **Celery** and **Redis** for robust, asynchronous background job queues. Job state and carbon metrics are stored persistently in **PostgreSQL** via **Supabase**. The frontend dashboard, which visualizes the active jobs and carbon savings, is a lightweight **React** application built with **Vite** and styled with **Tailwind CSS**.

title: FunctionalCity (CityPulse)
description: A lightweight, JSON-based civic issue reporting system allowing citizens to log local community problems and administrators to manage their resolution.
content:
### FunctionalCity

CityPulse (FunctionalCity) provides a highly accessible, low-overhead platform for municipalities or communities to track civic issues like potholes, broken streetlights, or waste management directly from citizens.

#### Key Features
- **Public Reporting:** Simple public form for citizens to log issues complete with descriptions, categories, and image uploads.
- **Issue Dashboard:** A public feed displaying all reported issues to maintain community transparency.
- **Admin Management:** Secure backend portal for administrators to toggle issue statuses (Pending/Resolved) and manage reports.

#### Technical Deep Dive
The application is built entirely using **PHP 8.4** focusing on a zero-configuration deployment model. To ensure extreme portability and low hosting costs, it completely bypasses traditional relational databases, opting instead for direct flat-file storage using **JSON** (`data.json`). Authentication is handled natively via PHP sessions with password hashing for the admin portal.

title: FunctionalEnterprise
description: A high-performance, visually striking digital agency website featuring dynamic portfolio showcases, service offerings, and an integrated contact workflow.
content:
### FunctionalEnterprise

FunctionalEnterprise serves as a premium digital storefront for a creative agency, designed to convert visitors through compelling case studies, clear service pricing, and undeniable social proof.

#### Key Features
- **Dynamic Portfolio:** A high-end featured work section showcasing previous agency projects with detailed case studies.
- **Service & Pricing:** Clear, structured outlines of agency services, processes, and transparent pricing models.
- **Data-Driven Content:** All testimonials, projects, and statistics are driven by a robust database rather than hardcoded content.

#### Technical Deep Dive
The platform leverages the cutting-edge **Next.js 16** App Router, performing parallel server-side data fetching for optimal Core Web Vitals. The UI is built with **Tailwind CSS v4** and animated extensively with **Framer Motion** for a premium agency feel. Data is managed via **Prisma ORM** connected to a **PostgreSQL** database, ensuring structured and scalable content management for the agency's portfolio.
